# PERF-222 negative: concrete function in loop
lang: go
file: PERF-222-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Row struct {
	Value int
}

func formatRow(v Row) int {
	return 1
}

func Render(rows []Row) int {
	total := 0
	for _, row := range rows {
		total += formatRow(row)
	}
	return total
}
